data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'First-time customer only' but did not provide any evidence confirming that this requirement is implemented or enforced in the system. The prior steps only show successful bookings without any indication of customer status checks or restrictions based on first-time customer criteria. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement of 'First-time customer only' requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for first-time customer checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the booking system checks if the customer is a first-time user before applying the discount.
